creator: royger@freebsd.org
text:
I assume the issue is still present in current FreeBSD versions, as I'm not aware of anyone fixing it.

For the specific question about how to get FreeBSD 10, there's an archive with old images:

http://ftp-archive.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD-Archive/old-releases/VM-IMAGES/10.4-RELEASE/amd64/Latest/
